name: timezone_set
description: Get or set the system timezone
command: if [ '{{action}}' = 'get' ]; then echo "Timezone: $(cat /etc/timezone 2>/dev/null || timedatectl show -p Timezone --value)" && echo "Current time: $(date)" && echo "UTC: $(date -u)"; else sudo timedatectl set-timezone '{{timezone}}' && echo "Timezone set to: {{timezone}}" && echo "Current time: $(date)"; fi
